title: HTML_TABLE
description: Generates a formatted HTML table string from records of the specified source object, filtered by matching field-value pairs and an optional query clause.

parameters.name: source_object_name
parameters.description: The API name of the object to query.

parameters.name: display_field_names
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of field API names to include as columns in the HTML table.

parameters.name: ...matching_field_name
parameters.description: The field API name used to filter records.

parameters.name: ...matching_field_value
parameters.description: The value to match against the corresponding field.

parameters.name: additional_clause_optional
parameters.description: Additional query conditions for more precise filtering.

examples.code:
HTML_TABLE(
        "Opportunity", 
        "Name, Amount, StageName, CloseDate", 
        "AccountId", Id, 
        "Amount > 5000 ORDER BY CloseDate DESC"
    )
-- Returns an HTML table string of Opportunity records related to the Account, filtered by Amount and sorted by CloseDate.
